nasb.text: Every man is stupid, devoid of knowledge; Every goldsmith is put to shame by his idols; For his molten images are deceitful, And there is no breath in them.

esv.text: Every man is stupid and without knowledge; every goldsmith is put to shame by his idols, for his images are false, and there is no breath in them.

cnv.text: 人人都是頑梗無知； 所有的金匠都因偶像羞愧， 因為他們鑄造的像都是虛假、沒有氣息的。

ccb.text: 人人愚昧无知， 工匠都因自己铸造的偶像而惭愧， 因为这些神像全是假的， 没有气息。
